text: NeMo Guardrails enables developers to define rails for preventing jailbreaks. Under inputs.coherence, if the input diverges from the allowed topic, it is blocked.
Garak is an LLM vulnerability scanner. The plugin encoding.Base64 tests whether the model can decode and follow base64-encoded instructions.
We implemented a local DeBERTa-v3 model to classify prompt injections. The model detects typical instruction overriding patterns like 'ignore the above'.
GitHub PR #42: Fixed a prompt injection vulnerability in the document parser by sanitizing system instructions before sending to the model.
LLM-Guard is an open-source library for securing LLM applications. Its prompt injection detector uses heuristics and model-based scoring.
Audit logs show a blocked attempt: 'Ignore all previous instructions' detected by DeBERTa-v3-prompt-injection-v2 at threshold 0.40.
To prevent indirect prompt injection, we recommend separating untrusted user data from system instructions using system/user roles.
The paper 'Not What You've Signed Up For' demonstrates indirect prompt injection attacks where malicious instructions are embedded in web pages.
We need to update the prompt injection defense to handle Base64 and ROT13 encoding of malicious instructions in tool outputs.
A common jailbreak technique involves role-playing, where the user asks the model to act as 'DAN' (Do Anything Now) and ignore safety guidelines.
Security advisory: A vulnerability in the email plugin allows attackers to inject commands via incoming emails (indirect prompt injection).
The system instructions define the agent's boundaries. Any attempt to modify these instructions should be flagged by the security gateway.
Issue #108: false positive flagged on benign README discussing how to defend against SQL injections and prompt injections.
The training dataset for the injection classifier includes 10,000 examples of both benign user queries and adversarial jailbreaks.
Our test suite runs 200 adversarial test cases from garak latentinjection to measure the recall of our security defenses.
